programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: (M) The crew visits a 120-year-old building in Salt Lake City's industrial district, where a break-in revealed remnants of a dark ritual.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: (M) Lisa and her husband renovate their home, but the work angers a malevolent force. With their lives in danger, Lisa turns to Cindy and Steve to save her desperate family.
